title: Aethera AI Dashboard
description: An AI-powered risk assessment and portfolio tracking dashboard designed for digital asset managers, offering real-time predictive analytics.
challenge: Aethera needed to visualize high-frequency multi-chain data and predictive risk signals in a simplified, highly responsive interface for institutional users.
solution: We designed an interactive dark-themed interface built on Next.js, featuring WebGL-powered data visualizer nodes, custom state management for real-time tickers, and responsive CSS grid architectures.
outcome: Improved user onboarding speed by 40% and reduced page load latencies to sub-100ms under heavy streaming websocket loads.

title: Helios Multi-Chain Wallet
description: A secure, smart contract-based mobile & web wallet focusing on account abstraction (ERC-4337) and simple social recoveries.
challenge: Helios wanted to make Web3 onboarding as simple as web2, eliminating the seed-phrase requirement without sacrificing security or self-custody.
solution: We crafted a comprehensive visual brand identity, UI/UX flows for social login recovery, and implemented Solidity smart account structures with gas sponsorship mechanics.
outcome: Successfully launched in Beta, securing 10k+ pre-registrations and processing 50k transactions on Arbitrum in the first week.
